$meta.purpose: Provide global shell layout metrics, grid guidelines, and breakpoints

breakpoints.mobile: < 768px (Sidebar is hidden behind trigger drawer, layout is single column)
breakpoints.md: >= 768px (Sidebar is pinned on the left side, grid spans 2 to 3 columns)
breakpoints.lg: >= 1024px (Ask AI Drawer is enabled and pushes main container padding by 400px)

sidebar.style: border-r border-border bg-card shrink-0 hidden md:block

header.style: border-b border-border bg-card shrink-0 flex items-center justify-between px-4

mainContainer.style: flex-1 flex flex-col h-screen overflow-hidden min-w-0

askAiDrawer.style: lg:pr-[400px] on main container when drawer is active

supportCenter.purpose: Dashboard landing page navigation panel list

browseTopics.gridClasses: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-x-8 gap-y-6
browseTopics.purpose: Grouping support cards by product categories

rules.name: Sidebar responsive strategy
rules.rule: For viewports below 768px (md), sidebar navigation must collapse into a mobile drawer activated by a hamburger menu trigger located in the header.
rules.evidence: Main layout controls state isMobileSidebarOpen and passes triggers down to Sidebar and Header.

rules.name: Desktop grid expansion
rules.rule: Ensure list layouts dynamically scale columns from 1 column on mobile to 2 columns on tablet and up to 3 or 6 columns on large screen sizes to maximize information density.
rules.evidence: SupportGrid (cols-1 to cols-6) and BrowseByTopic (cols-1 to cols-3) implement responsive grid spans.
